name: Rich Vos
blurb: In 1995 he became the first white comic to perform on HBOs Def Comedy Jam, and in 2003 he finished third on the first season of NBCs Last Comic Standing.
bio: Rich Vos is an American stand-up comedian, writer and actor from New Jersey who began performing in 1984. In 1995 he became the first white comic to perform on HBOs Def Comedy Jam, and in 2003 he finished third on the first season of NBCs Last Comic Standing. He is known for his crowd work and was a regular on Comedy Centrals Tough Crowd with Colin Quinn.

timeline.ev: First white comic to perform on Def Comedy Jam
Finished third on Last Comic Standing season one

accolades: First white comic to perform on Def Comedy Jam
